name: Cabbage Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup Parsley, or more to taste
1 1/2 Teaspoons Salt and Pepper, or to taste
1 Teaspoon Sugar, or less as desired
recipeInstructions:
Or use 3/4 Pound Ground Beef and 1/4 Pound Ground Pork.
Heat the olive oil in a pan. Add the ground beef and onion; sauté until browned. Stir in the raw rice, parsley, tomato paste, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Wash cabbage leaves in cold water. Place each leaf on a plate. Spoon about one tablespoon of the meat mixture onto the center of each leaf. Roll up tightly and secure with toothpicks if needed.
Place the cabbage rolls seam-side down in a heavy pot. Pour the remaining tomato paste, tomatoes, and sugar into the pot. Add enough water to cover the rolls.
Simmer for 1 to 2 hours, uncovered. If thickening sauce is desired, stir in cornstarch at serving time.
Serves 6
Source: "Mountain Measures"--Junior League of Charleston, WV ed. 1974
